title: DOOH Motion Type
description: Motion capability of a digital out-of-home screen. Determines which creative formats the screen can render.

enumDescriptions.full_motion: Screen supports full-motion video playback (e.g., LED billboards, transit screens with video capability)
enumDescriptions.partial_motion: Screen supports animated stills or limited motion (e.g., scrolling text, animated GIFs, HTML5 banners) but not full video
enumDescriptions.static: Screen displays static images only (e.g., e-ink displays, printed poster replacements)
